items.title: UEFA dismiss Barcelona missed red card appeal
items.summary: UEFA have ruled Barcelona's complaint over the refereeing in last week's Champions League quarterfinal loss to Atlético Madrid as "inadmissible."
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Brandon Beane: It's not all talk on Keon Coleman, we believe in his skill set

items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Varun returns as KKR choose to bowl against CSK
items.summary: CSK are ninth on the points table, while KKR are the only team without a win this season
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
